channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: US-Israel war on Iran dramatically expands across Middle East - The Guardian
item.description:
1. US-Israel war on Iran dramatically expands across Middle East  The Guardian
  2. Middle East crisis live: Israel launches new attacks on Tehran and Beirut as Trump lays out objectives  The Guardian
  3. Iran war live: Israel strikes at Hezbollah, Kuwait shoots down US jets in error  Reuters
  4. Iran war widens, threatening to engulf Lebanon  NPR
  5. Trump Outlines Four Goals for Iran Operation  WSJ

item.title: Iran conflict escalates: 4 U.S. service members killed as death toll climbs - Axios
item.description:
1. Iran conflict escalates: 4 U.S. service members killed as death toll climbs  Axios

  3. Fourth American service member killed in Iran operation  The Guardian
  4. U.S. troops killed amid Iranian counterattack, fueling air defense fears  The Washington Post
  5. 3 American troops killed, and Trump says more 'likely,' in war against Iran  NPR

item.title: Khamenei's death brings Khomeini's grandson into focus - Reuters
item.description:
1. Khamenei's death brings Khomeini's grandson into focus  Reuters
  2. A look at some of the contenders to be Iran’s supreme leader after the killing of Khamenei  AP News

  4. How Iran chooses its supreme leader, and who could be next?  CNBC
  5. Khamenei’s wife dies from injuries sustained in US, Israeli attack: State media  The Hill

item.title: Airline Stocks Tumble as Iran War Expands Across Middle East - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Airline Stocks Tumble as Iran War Expands Across Middle East  The New York Times
  2. The hole in the sky: How Middle East airspace closures are reshaping global aviation  CNN
  3. Travel stocks fall after thousands of flights grounded following Iran strikes  CNBC
  4. Hundreds of thousands of travelers stranded following U.S.-Israel attacks on Iran  PBS
  5. Air travel chaos intensifies as airports remain closed, flights canceled amid Iran war  CBS News

item.title: Starmer seeks to carve out distinct UK approach to this conflict - BBC
item.description:
1. Starmer seeks to carve out distinct UK approach to this conflict  BBC
  2. Starmer criticises Trump over Iran strikes, as he defends UK position  BBC
  3. UK ‘took far too long’ to let US use its airbases to attack Iran, Trump says  The Guardian
  4. UK will allow US to use bases to strike Iranian missile sites, PM says  BBC
  5. U.K. Doesn’t Believe in ‘Regime Change from the Skies,’ Starmer Says  WSJ

item.title: France offers to station nuclear weapons across Europe for the first time - Financial Times
item.description:
1. France offers to station nuclear weapons across Europe for the first time  Financial Times
  2. France to increase its number of nuclear warheads, Macron says – as it happened  The Guardian
  3. Macron to boost nuclear arsenal, involve European allies in doctrine change  Reuters
  4. Macron says France will allow temporary deployment of nuclear-armed jets to allied nations  NBC News
  5. Live: Macron unveils nuclear strategy amid Russian aggression and an uncertain US  France 24

item.title: Lebanese PM bans Hezbollah’s military activities after attack on Israel - Al Jazeera
item.description:
1. Lebanese PM bans Hezbollah’s military activities after attack on Israel  Al Jazeera

  4. Hezbollah just restarted the fight that Israel was waiting to finish  CNN
  5. Hegseth urges US troops to 'stay focused' as Operation Epic Fury devastates Iran  Fox News

item.title: Starmer Faces Dilemma After British Base in Cyprus Was Hit by a Drone - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Starmer Faces Dilemma After British Base in Cyprus Was Hit by a Drone  The New York Times

  3. Iranian-made drone hits British air base in Cyprus  Reuters
  4. Two drones headed to RAF base intercepted, Cyprus says  BBC

item.title: As Trump Bombs Iran, America’s Allies Watch Fitfully From Sidelines - The New York Times
item.description:
1. As Trump Bombs Iran, America’s Allies Watch Fitfully From Sidelines  The New York Times

  4. The Iran war makes it official – America is breaking with Europe  New Statesman
  5. US allies and foes left scrambling as Trump catches them off-guard on Iran  The Guardian

item.title: India and Canada reset ties with 'landmark' nuclear energy deal - BBC
item.description:
1. India and Canada reset ties with 'landmark' nuclear energy deal  BBC

item.title: Bagram Air Base Targeted by Pakistan, Afghanistan Says - The New York Times
item.description:

item.description:

item.title: 6 Conservative Voters React to Attacks on Iran Ahead of the Texas Primaries - The New York Times
item.description:
1. 6 Conservative Voters React to Attacks on Iran Ahead of the Texas Primaries  The New York Times
  2. Just one in four Americans say they back US strikes on Iran, Reuters/Ipsos poll finds  Reuters
  3. CNN poll: 59% of Americans disapprove of Iran strikes and most think a long-term conflict is likely  CNN
  4. 1 in 4 Americans back Trump’s Iran strikes, most say he’s too quick to use force: poll  Fox News
  5. More Americans disapprove than approve of U.S. strikes against Iran  Ipsos

item.title: Joint Statement on Iran’s Missile and Drone Attacks in the Region - U.S. Department of State (.gov)
item.description:

item.title: Live updates: Trump warns Iran about larger strikes as war spirals in Middle East - CNN
